title: Session Service
text: Session Service A Session Service is a Component that defines a business logic component for handling task-specific data processing for other components. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: cpt Main Development Object? Yes Has layout? No Part of: — Contains: Component Entity , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Specializations: — Compilation Output: Signature , SessionServiceName .ssv URI format: cpt: SessionServiceName Specialization Session Service specializes Component in the following ways: It has no layout. It has no user interface triggers. It compiles to a runtime object and a signature.
